title: helenium bigelovii
intro: Helenium bigelovii, also known as Bigelow's sneezeweed, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are believed to aid in wound healing and reduce the severity of cold and flu symptoms. The plant is also valued for its health benefits, such as relieving congestion and coughs, and supporting immune function. Helenium bigelovii can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
